title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Sika India

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Sika India
jsonLd.description:
We at Sika India are looking for an experienced Production Engineer based out of Rajkot. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Sika India:
Sika India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sika India!
